summary: Iteration 40 - Backend P0 Refactoring Verification Complete. All 6 extracted route modules (auth, notifications, social, infrastructure, minigames) are working correctly. Fixed missing import in minigames.py. 19/19 backend tests passed. Frontend login and navigation to all pages (Dashboard, Challenges, Minigames, Infrastructure, Marketplace, Social) working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified the backend P0 refactoring after steps 2, 4-6. All 6 route modules extracted from server.py are working: auth.py, notifications.py, social.py, infrastructure.py, minigames.py. Fixed missing imports in minigames.py (check_minigame_cooldown, MINIGAME_MAX_PLAYS, XP_REWARDS, get_level_from_xp, timedelta, generate_ai_questions). Test account test1@test.com/Test1234! has $10.1M funds, Level 0. Routes still in server.py (films, challenges, chat, festivals) also verified working.
